dublinCore.dc:title: 116 S4424 IS: To amend the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 to prohibit certain institutions of higher education from receiving research and development awards, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Scott of Florida introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To amend the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 to prohibit certain institutions of higher education from receiving research and development awards, and for other purposes.

section.header: Prohibition on research and development awards for certain institutions of higher education

subsection.text: Subtitle B of title II of division A of the William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 (Public Law 116–283) is amended by inserting after section 223 (42 U.S.C. 6605) the following new section:

section.header: Prohibition on research and development awards for certain institutions of higher education

subsection.text: If an institution of higher education receives from a foreign source funds to carry out a specified task, such institution may not, for a period of 5 years after such receipt, be awarded a research and development award.

paragraph.text: The term artificial intelligence has the meaning given such term in section 5002.

The term biotechnology means the application of science and engineering in the direct or indirect utilization of living organisms or parts or products of such organisms, including modified forms of such organisms, parts, or products, as the case may be.
The term foreign source means any of the following entities:

subparagraph.text: An entity established under the laws of such government.
An entity in which such government holds ownership interest of not less than 25 percent.
An agent of any of the entities described in subparagraphs (A) through (C), including any of the following:

clause.text: A subsidiary of such an entity.
A person that operates primarily for the benefit of, or under the auspices of, such an entity, such as a foundation of such entity, or an educational, cultural, or language entity.

paragraph.text: The term institution of higher education has the meaning given such term in section 101(a) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1001(a)).
The term quantum information science has the meaning given such term in section 2 of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8801).
The term research and development award has the meaning given such term in section 223.
The term specified foreign government means the government of any of the following countries:

subparagraph.text: The Democratic People’s Republic of Korea.
Any other country the Secretary of State determines appropriate.

paragraph.text: The term specified task means research and development relating to a national security or military application, including relating to any of the following:

subsection.text: The William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 (Public Law 116–283) is amended in the table of contents in section 2(b) and in title II of division A by inserting after the items relating to section 223 the following new items:

toc.toc-entry: Sec. 223A. Prohibition on research and development awards for certain institutions of higher education.
